title: Juan Schwartz
content:
{{Top|rwp}}
{{Person
|image=
|name=Juan Schwartz
|birth=

|listedpronouns=<!--Only include pronouns if they have been explicitly specified by the individual to which this article pertains.-->

'''Juan Schwartz''' was an alias of [[Pablo Hidalgo]].<ref name="Twitter 2">{{Twitter|pablohidalgo|status/778441441802461184|[[Pablo Hidalgo]]|quote=2/2 So I used the alias "Juan Schwartz" when I wrote for Wizards of the Coast, a reference to Cannibal: The Musical.|archivefile=File:Pablo Alias 2-2 Twitter.png}}</ref> Hidalgo used it because of short-live rule that prohibited Lucasfilm employees from doing freelance work for publishers.<ref name="Twitter 1">{{Twitter|pablohidalgo|status/778441131507879937|[[Pablo Hidalgo]]|quote=1/2 Fun fact: In the early 2000s, there was a short-lived rule that if you worked for LFL, you couldn't freelance for publishers.|archivefile=File:Pablo Alias 1-2 Twitter.png}}</ref> He used the alias in [[Star Wars Gamer 5|''Star Wars Gamer'' 5]] as the author of ''[[The University of Sanbra Guide to Intelligent Life: The Chiss]]'' and as a co-author of ''[[The Emperor's Pawns]]'', with [[Abel G. Peña]].

The alias was itself a reference to Cannibal: The Musical.<ref name="Twitter 2" />
